services.data_desc: Custom market reports, price forecasting models, and trade flow analysis built on decades of historical data.

cta.title: Join the Network
cta.subtitle: AWAKE is currently invite-only. Request access to get early entry into Azerbaijan's premier coffee intelligence platform.
cta.note: No payment required. Membership is free during early access.

about.title: About AWAKE
about.subtitle: Built in Baku, for the world.
about.mission: To democratize coffee market intelligence. We believe every roaster, trader, and enthusiast deserves access to the same caliber of data that was once reserved for commodity trading floors.
about.story: AWAKE was born from a simple observation: Azerbaijan's coffee culture is booming, but the data infrastructure hasn't kept pace. We set out to build a platform that bridges the gap between global coffee markets and local industry — combining decades of historical data from the ICO, World Bank, and UN with on-the-ground intelligence from Azerbaijan's growing specialty scene.
about.value_1: Every insight is grounded in verified, open-source data from authoritative global institutions.
about.value_2: We know Azerbaijan's coffee landscape intimately — the roasters, the sellers, the culture.
about.value_3: Premium intelligence shouldn't be locked behind commodity-trader paywalls. We're building for everyone.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Whether you're a roaster, seller, or data enthusiast — we'd love to hear from you.

services_page.title: Services
services_page.subtitle: Full-spectrum capabilities for the modern coffee enterprise.
services_page.data_intelligence_desc: Custom market models, price forecasting, trade flow visualization, and automated reporting. We process data from the ICO, World Bank, USDA, FAOSTAT, and UN Comtrade to deliver actionable insights.
services_page.software_desc: End-to-end software development — web platforms, mobile apps, APIs, and data pipelines. Built with modern architecture: React, Node.js, cloud-native infrastructure, and AI-powered features.
services_page.ai_desc: Predictive analytics, demand forecasting, quality grading automation, and natural language interfaces for your coffee data. Custom models trained on industry-specific datasets.
services_page.infrastructure_desc: Secure, scalable hosting and data storage. API access to our market data feeds. Custom dashboards and monitoring solutions deployed to edge networks worldwide.
services_page.consulting_desc: Market entry strategy, supply chain optimization, sourcing partnerships, and competitive intelligence. Leverage our network across 70+ coffee-producing countries.

prices.title: Coffee Prices
prices.subtitle: Historical and current market data for Arabica and Robusta coffee, sourced from the World Bank and ICO.
prices.source: Source: World Bank Commodity Price Data (Pink Sheet)
